description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle  (Vehicle 1), operating in manual mode, was stopped for a red traffic light  on northbound Van Ness Avenue, at the 
intersection with Mission St in San Francisco. A  passenger car (Vehicle 2), traveling in the same direction, was stopped in the adjacent lane 
to the right of the Zoox vehicle. As the signal turned green, both vehicles proceeded forward and shortly after that Vehicle 2 suddenly veered
 left into Zoox vehicle's travel lane. The driver side quarter panel of Vehicle 2 made contact with the passenger side fender of the Zoox 
vehicle. The quarter panel of Vehicle 2 appeared to have scrapes and there was no damage to the Zoox vehicle. There were no reported 
injuries and police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
